title: Resounding Modern Warfare Assets
description:
The hardcore sounds that you’ve always wanted out of Vic’s Modern Warfare. 
Not recommended for use on rapid-pace, arcadey-PvP servers.
body:
You’ve read the tagline, so here’s what you need to know: These sounds were edited by me, and are designed for hardcore/survival gameplay. The way sounds work in VMW means I can’t add variations or use a shot/auto/tailfire system like Triple-A FPS games, so each individual shot has an echo attached. This means that if you have a lot of people shooting at the same time it’s going to sound very loud, and a bit overkill.

This pack will work with base VMW versions if you change the "mwc" folder's name to "mw", and *should* work with Paneedah’s versions, be that PMW or MWC, **but you will miss out on some features**: For those, you’ll have to use Resounding Modern Warfare, which as a bonus, will give you some more guns to play with. Resounding Modern Warfare is designed to change as little of the functionality of the mod as possible, with the first priority being the addition of new sound events, and the second being the addition of more content. Shameless plug over-with, I hope this pack enhances your gameplay experience. 


You can find Resounding Modern Warfare [here.](https://github.com/TheDec0ded1/resounding-modern-warfare/tree/active)
